description_long: This is a modern, four-door black police car with a streamlined sedan body, featuring prominent 'POLICE' lettering in bold white on both side doors. The vehicle is equipped with a roof-mounted emergency light bar, which is blue and white, and a sunroof is visible on the roof. The car has silver alloy wheels, side mirrors, and detailed headlights and taillights. The rear of the car displays the word 'POLICE' in white, and the windows are tinted for privacy. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban law enforcement duties, with clear law enforcement markings and emergency equipment.
description: A sleek black police sedan with bold white 'POLICE' lettering, blue-and-white roof lights, and silver wheels, designed for urban law enforcement.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large 'POLICE' text, blue-and-white roof light bar, and silver wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the 'POLICE' text on the trunk, taillights, and the roof light bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with identical 'POLICE' text, roof light bar, and visible side mirrors.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the grille, headlights, and the roof light bar.
attribute_police_markings: Large white 'POLICE' text is displayed on both side doors and on the rear trunk. A blue stripe runs above the side text, and the rear also features the 'POLICE' text in white. No department names or numbers are visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar is present, featuring blue and white segments in a rectangular arrangement. No additional grille or rear deck lights are visible.
